zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard de Fitton於大約1150年出生在英國爾霍利時，他的父親Richard de Fitton32歲，母親Maud de Lacy26歲。他於1174年與Ciceley de Massey在英國爾普雷斯特波利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1210年在英國爾波利 費享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard de Fitton于大约1150年出生在英国爾霍利时，他的父亲Richard de Fitton32岁，母亲Maud de Lacy26岁。他于1174年与Ciceley de Massey在英国爾普雷斯特波利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1210年在英国爾波利 費享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fitton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English fiton, fittin ‘lie, falsehood’, for a lier or cheat.

possibly a habitational name from Fitton Hall in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, named in Anglo-Scandinavian as ‘settlement by the meadow-land’, from Old English tūn + Old Norse fit, a term denoting grassland on the bank of a river.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard de Fitton was born about 1150, in Chorley, Cheshire, England, his father, Richard de Fitton, was 32 and his mother, Maud de Lacy, was 26. He married Ciceley de Massey in 1174, in Prestbury, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died about 1210, in Bollin Fee, Cheshire, England, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard de Fitton est né environ 1150, à Chorley, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Fitton, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Maud de Lacy, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Ciceley de Massey en 1174, à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé environ 1210, à Bollin Fee, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard de Fitton um 1150 in Chorley, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Fitton 32 und seine Mutter Maud de Lacy 26. Er hat 1174 in Prestbury, Cheshire, England Ciceley de Massey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb um 1210 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Bollin Fee, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard de Fitton è nato il circa 1150 nel Chorley, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Richard de Fitton, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Lacy, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Ciceley de Massey nel 1174, nel Prestbury, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì circa 1210, nel Bollin Fee, Cheshire, England, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard de Fittonが約1150年にイギリスチェシュアイアチオルリーで生まれた時，父Richard de Fittonは32歳，母Maud de Lacyは26歳であった。1174年にイギリスチェシュアイアプレストブリーでCiceley de Masseyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は約1210年にイギリスチェシュアイアボリン フイーで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard de Fitton(이)가 대략 1150년 영국 체실르 초를리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Fitton(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Lacy(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1174년 영국 체실르 플레스트버이에서 Ciceley de Massey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1210년 영국 체실르 볼린 프이에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1150–about 1210: tany ho any amin'ny 1150–tany ho any amin'ny 1210

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard de Fitton nasceu aproximadamente 1150, em Chorley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Fitton, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Lacy, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Ciceley de Massey em 1174, em Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1210, em Bollin Fee, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard de Fitton родился около 1150 г. в местности чаурли, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Fitton было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Maud de Lacy, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Ciceley de Massey в 1174 г. в местности престбури, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер около 1210 г. в местности боллинь фи, чешир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет.

sm.about 1150–about 1210: e tusa o le 1150–e tusa o le 1210

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard de Fitton nació aproximadamente 1150, en Chorley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Fitton, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Maud de Lacy, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Ciceley de Massey en 1174, en Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1210, en Bollin Fee, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años.
